props.name: children
props.description: The text or elements to be animated. If a string is provided, it will be split into words.

props.name: scrollContainerRef
props.description: Optional ref for the scroll container. If provided, GSAP will use this container for scroll triggers; otherwise, it defaults to the window.

props.name: enableBlur
props.description: Enables the blur animation effect on the words.

props.name: baseOpacity
props.description: The initial opacity value for the words before the animation.

props.name: baseRotation
props.description: The starting rotation (in degrees) for the container before it animates to 0.

props.name: blurStrength
props.description: The strength of the blur effect (in pixels) applied at the start of the animation.

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class(es) to apply to the container element.

props.name: textClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class(es) to apply to the text element.

props.name: rotationEnd
props.description: The scroll trigger end point for the container rotation animation.

props.name: wordAnimationEnd
props.description: The scroll trigger end point for the word opacity and blur animations. The animation will complete when the bottom of the text reaches the bottom of the container.
